hero.eyebrow: The gold standard in clinical AI
hero.title: Clinical documentation for the full encounter — not just the conversation.
hero.subtitle: Aurion captures what happens in the room: physical exam, imaging on screen, and dialogue — then turns it into structured notes you can review and export.
hero.support: Wearables, smart glasses, and devices already in your workflow. Built for busy clinic and procedural days.
hero.caption: From observation to documentation — in one flow

pillars.title: One partner for documentation across how you work
pillars.subtitle: From audio-first scribing to full visual and screen context — pick the depth that matches your day.

scribe.label: Scribe
scribe.headline: Audio and exam documentation — start free
scribe.body: Transcription, SOAP-structured output, and plain text export. Move up when you need specialty templates and a full template library.
bullets: Try vision features at no cost on Free

vision.label: Vision
vision.headline: Full encounter capture — what was seen and reviewed
vision.body: Continuous audio and video, screen and imaging context, citation-aware drafts, and exports that match how you work in clinic.

suite.label: Suite
suite.headline: Clinic plus procedural documentation
suite.body: For teams that need operative workflows, milestones, voice commands, and audit-ready exports — we'll align scope with you before rollout.

documented: The record is reconstructed after the fact
happens: Imaging is reviewed in real time
Clinical decisions are made from what is seen
reality.bottomLine: The record rarely reflects the encounter.

tension.statement: In visually driven specialties, the most important parts of the exam are often not spoken.
tension.closing: These details inform decisions — but are not consistently captured.

steps.title: Start the encounter
steps.description: Begin recording with a single action

devices.title: Take documentation wherever care happens
devices.subtitle: Wards, clinics, procedural areas, and noisy hallways — use wearables, glasses, and mounts you already carry. Aurion coordinates capture from the device that fits the moment.

stats.eyebrow: Why teams look beyond audio-only scribes

items.title: Passive capture
items.subtitle: Stay with the patient — no mid-visit prompts or manual tagging.

items.title: Multimodal by design
items.subtitle: Audio, point-of-view, and screen context in one documentation flow.

items.title: Specialty-aware
items.subtitle: Templates and exports that reflect how visual exams are documented.

coreDifference.title: Grounded in the encounter
coreDifference.lead: Each part of the note corresponds to something that occurred during the visit.
coreDifference.line2: It is derived from the encounter.

presence.title: Stay present in the moments that matter most
presence.subtitle: Aurion is built so documentation chases the encounter — not the other way around.

trust.title: Your duty of care, reflected in how we build
trust.lead: Aurion is positioned as a documentation tool. We align security and data handling with your institution's requirements before go-live.
badges: You control export and retention policies

pillars.title: Grounded in the visit
pillars.body: Outputs are tied to what was said, shown, and reviewed — so notes reflect the encounter, not a late reconstruction.

pillars.title: Human in the loop
pillars.body: Clinicians review and approve documentation before it leaves Aurion. Automation supports the record; it does not replace judgment.

pillars.title: Privacy without shortcuts
pillars.body: We design for environments where identifiable imagery and screen content must be handled with care — details are discussed during onboarding.

enterprise.title: Volume pricing and enterprise rollout
enterprise.body: For multi-seat clinics and organizations that need onboarding, governance, and export aligned to your policies — we'll scope together.

audience.title: Designed for clinicians where the exam is visual

finalCta.title: Feel the difference when documentation follows the visit.
finalCta.subtitle: Start on the free tier, compare plans, or talk to us about pilot and enterprise rollout.
